wordplay_note: His name signals concealment — he is an agent within the simulation
card_description: Bill Black (meaning "Black = dark / hidden") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Time Out of Joint*. Ragle's friend who is secretly a military handler maintaining the illusion. Name note: His name signals concealment — he is an agent within the simulation. The spy next door — friendship as surveillance. First appears in *Time Out of Joint*.

reference.brief: Ragle's friend who is secretly a military handler maintaining the illusion
reference.significance: The spy next door — friendship as surveillance
